privileged_info_summary: This task analyzes 200722_tcp_anon.pcapng, a real (non-synthetic) Wireshark SampleCaptures file containing netcat TCP traffic. The file is downloaded from the official Wireshark wiki at https://wiki.wireshark.org/uploads/1894ec2950fd0e1bfbdac49b3de0bc92/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng (redirects to GitLab). The PCAP file path is /home/ga/Documents/captures/200722_tcp_anon.pcapng and the output report must be written to /home/ga/Documents/captures/tcp_connection_state_report.txt. The file contains TCP stream data suitable for analyzing connection states (SYN, SYN-ACK, FIN, RST packets) and stream statistics.
